name: Tablut
author: AGP (traditional Sami/Scandinavian tafl)
description: Tablut, the 9x9 Sami tafl recorded by Linnaeus. Asymmetric siege: a King on the central throne with 8 Swedish defenders in a diamond, against 16 Muscovite attackers in four groups at the edge midpoints (attackers move first). All pieces move like a rook. Soldiers are captured by custodial flanking; the King must be surrounded on all four sides. The King wins by escaping to any edge square; the attackers win by capturing the King.
